title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Options BOEv3 Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Options BOEv3 Specification
Latest revision: v1.1.16 (2026-06-30)
Updated RoutingInst in List of Message FIelds, indicating S=Expose order via Step-Up Mechanism (SUM) will be applicable to C2 effective 09/04/26.

title: Introduction
Cboe Titanium U.S. Customer Web Portal Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Customer Web Portal Specification
Latest revision: v1.3.21 (2026-06-30)
Added Equities Trade Data/Trade Detail File Format section. Order Entry Date will be added as the first column (effective 11/02/26). Updated the Trade Time sample value to 09:30:01.190456715 in the Futures Trade Data File Format.

title: Cboe U.S. Equities Overnight Trading Faq
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities TOP Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities TOP Specification
Latest revision: v1.3.9 (2026-06-30)
Updated Timestamp data type to indicate that negative offsets are possible and will have a minus sign '-' in the left most location.Added Time Reference Message Fields, effective 11/02/26 on BZX and EDGX.

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Summary Depth Feed Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Summary Depth Feed Specification
Latest revision: v1.0.9 (2026-06-30)
Last Update Timestamp, Timestamp, and Transaction Time fields will be encoded as the number of nanoseconds since epoch effective 11/02/26.

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Opening Process
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Opening Process
Latest revision: v2.0.3 (2026-06-30)
Updated Early Order Acceptance Period and Pre-Market Open to note that on EDGX, orders are accepted beginning 8.55 p.m. ET (effective 12/07/26).Added a new column for EDGX (effective 12/07/26) in Contingent Forced Opening (CFO).

raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities/Options Web Portal Port Controls Specification
Latest revision: v1.4.33 (2026-06-30)
Noted in Pre-Market Trading (Equities Only) that EDGX customers will have the ability to restrict trading in the Overnight Trading Session (effective 12/07/26).

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities FIX Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities FIX Specification
Latest revision: v2.9.56 (2026-06-30)
Pegged orders entered without a Price (44) are only accepted during RTH (effective 12/07/26).Updated TimeInForce language for EDGX 23x5 trading (effective 12/07/26). "Early Trading Session Opt-out" and "Hold Early to 7am" port attributes will be sunset 12/07/26.Added new "Hold Early Orders Until" port attribute (effective 12/07/26).

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Risk Management Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities Risk Management Specification
Latest revision: v1.1.13 (2026-06-30)
Effective 12/07/26, the EDGX cutoff for the next trading date will be 8:30 p.m. ET.

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities BOEv3 Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities BOEv3 Specification
Latest revision: v1.0.10 (2026-06-30)
Pegged orders entered without a Price (44) are only accepted during RTH (effective 12/07/26).Updated TimeInForce language for EDGX 23x5 trading (effective 12/07/26). "Early Trading Session Opt-out" and "Hold Early to 7am" port attributes will be sunset 12/07/26.Added new "Hold Early Orders Until" port attribute (effective 12/07/26).

title: Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities/Options Multicast PITCH Specification
raw_text:
Cboe Titanium U.S. Equities/Options Multicast PITCH Specification
Latest revision: v2.41.72 (2026-06-30)
Effective 11/02/26, the BZX/EDGX Equities PITCH feed will start on Sunday at approximately 1:35 p.m. ET and shut down on Friday at approximately 8:05 p.m.Effective 11/02/26, the Time Reference message and the Epoch Time field in the Time message will be extended to BZX/EDGX Equities.Effective 09/04/26, Auction Notification Message, Auction Cancel Message, and Auction Trade Message will include C2.
